scope: adversarial feedback coverage followed by one unchanged-loop Chapter 3 repair
baseline_boundary: ab6ab1f — run-006 closed with no arm or method promoted

starting_artifacts.repair_substrate: run-006 Arm A control, unpromoted; sha256 8a17c510230a182b10a1a089c582b1914ef81a3e98f8bf5ce5f2b171afca8860
starting_artifacts.sol_review: run-006 Arm A Sol review; sha256 b35bc87058f1749dba704d6e48372269669c88437cbdcacfb263bbb4ededc34c

substrate_selection.reason: Arm A is the preregistered control, is no worse on the shared semantic blockers, and is objectively closer on short-sentence craft than Arm B

experiment.observation: the same installation and premature mechanism claims survived both run-006 writing modes while prior reviews incompletely surfaced the generic evidence/job boundary
experiment.mechanism: the unchanged writer can comply once independent adversarial review fully surfaces the evidence and chapter-ownership boundary
experiment.single_production_lever: feedback coverage supplied as raw independent reviews to one defect-scoped revision
experiment.prerequisite: fresh Grok 4.5 independently corroborates the installation and C-10 ownership defect class on exact Arm A
experiment.writer_input_if_triggered: unchanged full context plus exact Arm A and the raw blocker-bearing Sol and Grok reviews; no synthesized checklist
experiment.post_measurement: fresh Sol and Grok reviews plus deterministic descriptive metrics

decision_rule.supported: Grok corroborates and the revision receives fresh convergent Sol/Grok ACCEPT with no new blocker and the objective craft prediction passes
decision_rule.refuted: the same explicitly surfaced installation or C-10 mechanism defect survives or is recreated
decision_rule.inconclusive: Grok does not corroborate, post-reviewers disagree, or failure is only an unrelated new defect

experiment.product_promotion: only a convergently accepted exact chapter may become live Chapter 3; the feedback-coverage method remains unpromoted
experiment.after_product_acceptance: immediately run full Chapters 1–3 Stage-A objective and blind pairwise gates before another optimization

quality_prediction.short_sentence_reduction: at least 5.0 percentage points from Arm A metrics.py baseline 30.5%, toward the approximately 20% target
quality_prediction.semantic: remove universal prevalence or exposure claims, causal installation language, cue or anticipation diagnosis, and promised pull dissolution; retain duplicate and permanence repairs
quality_prediction.gate: fresh convergent ACCEPT from Sol and Grok

held_constant: accepted research, framing, normalized plan, and prior chapters
shared chapter-writer, chapter-reviewer, and style prompts
Opus 4.6 through OpenRouter with reasoning none
fresh reviewer contexts and no time or reasoning cap
no shared prompt, plan, style, research, schema, or live chapter change before convergence

initial_adversarial_reviewer.endpoint_max_completion_tokens: unreported by authenticated catalog; max_tokens supported

calls.error: The model grok-4.5 is not available in your region.

measurement_policy: objective code supplies counts as facts; models judge evidence ownership, method integrity, persuasion, and prose
direction_audit: NO-GO on shared-prompt change, Grok tie-break, or another optimization A/B; conditional GO on this one simple-loop validation
factory_promotion_boundary: the chapter may advance on convergence; the review-coverage method requires later cross-chapter replication and Stage C
stop_rule: same explicitly surfaced defect surviving this run makes three consecutive same-dimension failures and triggers HARNESS §11 escalation
prerequisite_status: UNINSTANTIATED — Grok route returned regional 403 before a completion; Opus has not run
notes: The authenticated catalog exposed Grok 4.5, but the actual xAI route denied this region. The exact H-044 prerequisite cannot be treated as corroborated or contradicted. No usage was charged and no writer or post-review call ran.
